chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Const. Petition No. D-6324 of 2025 __________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature(s) of Judge(s) Hearing/priority 1. For orders on office objection 2. For orders on CMA No.26387/2025 3. For hearing of main case 29.01.2026 Mirza Daniyal Ahmed, Advocate for the petitioner Mr. Muhammad Usman Ahmed, Advocate for Respondent No.1 Ms. Zahrah Sahar Vayani, Assistant Attorney General ---------------------- Muhammad Saleem Jessar, J:- Through this petition the petitioner has challenged sealing of his shop by the Cantonment Board Clifton (“CBC”). Learned counsel for Respondent No.1 CBC has filed reply, wherein it has been stated that the shop of the petitioner has been de-sealed. Learned counsel submits that the sealing was done without issuing notice. Learned counsel for Respondent No.1 undertakes that the respondents shall take every action in accordance with law. This petition is therefore disposed of with the directions to the respondents that the CBC shall not take any action without giving a chance of hearing to the petitioner and if it is found that the petitioner was operating business in contravention of any of the Cantonment provisions, the action shall be taken after granting them reasonable opportunity of hearing. The respondents shall conduct themselves strictly in accordance with law. JUDGE HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE B-K Soomro
